title: dicerandra frutescens var. immaculata
intro: Dicerandra frutescens var. immaculata, also known as Blue Dragon or White Dragon, is a perennial plant species within the family Gesneriaceae, native to the southeastern United States and commonly found in bogs and wetlands. This plant has been utilized in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Dicerandra frutescens var. immaculata include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
